TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Pangangan 膽曼名稱由來 == Ta´man a niyaro', itini i Tahapinangan 特色 Tamdaw 人口 Itiniay i Changbin Cen no Taitung ko Ta´man a niyaro', 101 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 279 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 90% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 252 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 10% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 27 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis88%, roma3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Pitooran 信仰 O finacadan no Yincomi 所屬阿美族群
S.PHON: == paŋaŋan ****** == ta*man a nijaro~uʡ, itini i taħapinaŋan ** tamɬ~ɮaw ** itiniaj i ʦħaŋb~b~vin ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u ta*man a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis**%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. pito~uo~uran ** o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umi ******
S.FORM: == Pangangan 膽曼名稱由來 == Ta´man a niyaro', itini i Tahapinangan 特色 Tamdaw 人口 Itiniay i Changbin Cen no Taitung ko Ta´man a niyaro', 101 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 279 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 90% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 252 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 10% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 27 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis88%, roma3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Pitooran 信仰 O finacadan no Yincomi 所屬阿美族群
S.PHON: == paŋaŋan ****** == ta*man a nijaro~uʡ, itini i taħapinaŋan ** tamɬ~ɮaw ** itiniaj i ʦħaŋb~b~vin ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u ta*man a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis**%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. pito~uo~uran ** o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umi ******
